summary: Tested MongoDB GridFS image storage and Admin Analytics Dashboard. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Dashboard with KPIs and charts working correctly. Image upload in question edit modal verified.

issues: Mini bar charts using custom implementation - working but could use full Recharts library for more interactive charts

critical_code_review_comments: GridFS image storage properly initialized in server.py with init_image_storage(db)
Image routes properly handle upload (POST /api/images/upload), retrieval (GET /api/images/{id}), and deletion (DELETE /api/images/{id})
Admin token verification correctly applied to protected endpoints
Dashboard metrics correctly aggregate data from users, payments, quiz_attempts, and content collections
Image upload field properly integrated in question edit modal
Cache-Control headers set for 1 year on image responses for optimal performance

success_rate.frontend: 100% verified - Dashboard KPIs, charts, and image upload modal working

backend_apis.POST /api/images/upload: PASS - Uploads image to GridFS, returns image_id and url
backend_apis.GET /api/images/{image_id}: PASS - Retrieves image with correct content-type and cache headers
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/dashboard: PASS - Returns all metrics (users, subscriptions, revenue, simulations, content)
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/revenue/chart: PASS - Returns daily revenue data for chart
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/subscriptions/c: PASS - Returns subscription data by type
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics/content/top: PASS - Returns top courses by attempts

frontend_admin_dashboard.kpi_cards: PASS - Shows Ingresos Totales, Suscripciones Activas, Usuarios Totales, Simulacros Totales
frontend_admin_dashboard.mini_bar_charts: PASS - Ingresos, Nuevos Usuarios, Simulacros charts display correctly
frontend_admin_dashboard.content_stats: PASS - Shows Cursos, Lecciones, Preguntas, Universidades, Preguntas Uni counts
frontend_admin_dashboard.recent_activity: PASS - Shows recent simulations and user registrations with timestamps
frontend_admin_dashboard.conversion_metrics: PASS - Shows Tasa de conversión, Trial activo, MRR, Simulacros/Usuario

frontend_image_upload.edit_question_modal: PASS - Opens with all fields visible
frontend_image_upload.image_upload_field: PASS - 'Imagen de la pregunta (opcional)' with Choose File button

image_persistence.upload_retrieve_cycle: PASS - Uploaded image retrieved with identical content
image_persistence.gridfs_storage: PASS - Images stored in MongoDB GridFS collection

context_for_next_testing_agent: GridFS image storage fully tested and working. Admin dashboard analytics verified with all chart endpoints returning proper data. Question edit modal includes image upload field. All 19 backend API tests passing. Consider testing actual image upload in browser context if needed (requires file selection interaction).
